mapper.sql: id, class_name, major_id, major_name, grade, teacher_id, teacher_name, student_count, enabled, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, m.major_name, t.name as teacher_name FROM class_info c LEFT JOIN major m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT c.*, m.major_name, t.name as teacher_name FROM class_info c LEFT JOIN major m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT c.*, m.major_name, t.name as teacher_name FROM class_info c LEFT JOIN major m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.class_name = #{className}

SELECT c.*, m.major_name, t.name as teacher_name FROM class_info c LEFT JOIN major m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.major_id = #{majorId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_info (class_name, major_id, major_name, grade, teacher_id, teacher_name, student_count, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{className}, #{majorId}, #{majorName}, #{grade}, #{teacherId}, #{teacherName}, #{studentCount}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE class_info SET class_name = #{className}, major_id = #{majorId}, major_name = #{majorName}, grade = #{grade}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, teacher_name = #{teacherName}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE class_info SET student_count = #{count}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{classId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class_info WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class_info WHERE class_name = #{className}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class_info WHERE major_id = #{majorId}
